column27: Formpipe is a value driven software company - we put people first and at the centre of digital transformation. Our mission is to build valuable relationships between data and people. Passionate about creating value for our customers, we contribute to an inclusive, trustworthy and sustainable digital society.

Formpipe is a value driven software company - we put people first and at the centre of digital transformation. Our mission is to build valuable relationships between data and people. Passionate about creating value for our customers, we contribute to an inclusive, trustworthy and sustainable digital society.

Formpipe est une société de logiciels dans le domaine de la gestion de contenu d'entreprise (ECM) et est cotée au Nasdaq OMX Nordic.
Formpipe crée des solutions de production et de gestion de documents pour les plus grandes banques, fabricants et détaillants du monde.
Basée en Suède, avec des bureaux en Europe et aux États-Unis, elle dispose d'une vaste base de clients, de partenaires et d'assistance qui s'étend dans le monde entier.

Formpipe Software is a leading provider of document and output management solutions, helping organisations streamline compliance, communication, and digital transformation. Through its Lasernet platform, Formpipe empowers businesses to create, manage, and deliver documents seamlessly across ERP, CRM, and core banking systems.
